summary: Iteration 43 - Demo Workflow Data Verification. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working. Verified job LMN-6001, 3 Maintenance Alpha submissions (leader 3 photos, member 3 photos, emergency 0+1 issue photo), emergency flags, photo serving via Supabase, rapid reviews by 7 staff (Tim A, Scott W, Zach O, Scott K, Fran P, Craig S, Johnny H), management review on member sub (~81.8%), Owner/GM have no rapid reviews on demo submissions, dashboard emergency widget shows 1 incident, crew portal shows all 3 submissions.
seed_data_creation: Demo workflow data seeded via Python scripts. Key IDs: Job=LMN-6001, Leader=sub_16bdb9242407, Member=sub_7d5246c4a4a9, Emergency=sub_6dd05e2b5f1e
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified complete demo workflow: 1) Job LMN-6001 exists with correct metadata (Longvue HOA - 291 Mailbox Bed Edging, Maintenance division, TR-05). 2) Maintenance Alpha crew (be1da0c6) has 3 submissions: leader (3 photos), member (3 photos), emergency (0 main + 1 issue photo). 3) Emergency submission has is_emergency=true, incident_acknowledged=false, appears in /api/incidents/active. 4) Photos served correctly via /api/submissions/files/{id}/{filename} from Supabase storage. 5) Rapid reviews exist from Tim A (leader), Scott W (member), plus Zach O, Scott K, Fran P, Craig S, Johnny H on other Fran/Install submissions. 6) Management review on member submission from Scott K with ~81.8% score. 7) Owner (Adam S) and GM (Tyler C) have NO rapid reviews on demo submissions. 8) Dashboard shows emergency widget with 1 incident. 9) Crew portal /crew/be1da0c6 shows all 3 submissions with correct statuses (Emergency, Management Reviewed, Ready for Review). 10) Marcus Thompson (Maintenance Alpha leader) shows 81.8 score in Crew Leader Performance widget.
